hero.heading: I build digital products
hero.subheading: 3+ years building fast, modern web apps — from front-end architecture to full-stack features built to last.

story.heading: From first line of code to Project Lead
story.subheading: The milestones that shaped how I think, build, and deliver.
story.m1Desc: Started with Software Development Academy's "Java from Scratch" program — learning Java, the Spring Framework, MySQL, Hibernate and REST APIs, plus front-end basics, while applying Agile and TDD practices on hands-on projects.
story.m2Desc: Joined the SkillBrain Web Developer mentorship and went all-in on JavaScript, React, Next.js and TypeScript — alongside Tailwind CSS, PostgreSQL, Prisma, tRPC, Supabase and the T3 Stack, with clean-code practices and GitHub-based collaboration.
story.m3Desc: Started as a Front-End Developer Intern, shipping production apps in Agile teams: a live auction platform (Blitz Arena) with Next.js, Prisma, tRPC and NextAuth, then a responsive online learning platform built with React and Vite.
story.m4Desc: Helped build a financial services web platform from the ground up — landing pages, authentication, onboarding and dashboards — plus internal tools supporting day-to-day operational workflows.
story.m5Title: Project Lead on an ERP platform
story.m5Desc: Stepped up as Project Lead on an ERP platform digitalizing transport & logistics: designed the front-end architecture, built order-management and fleet-tracking modules with shadcn/ui, and set up unit tests with Vitest at high coverage.

skills.heading: Technologies I work with daily
skills.subheading: A modern, battle-tested stack chosen for performance, developer experience, and long-term maintainability.

values.heading: The principles behind every project
values.subheading: Not just a set of tools — a way of thinking about software that makes products better and collaborations smoother.
values.v1Desc: Every line of code is written to be read, tested, and maintained. Fast delivery never comes at the cost of correctness or clarity.
values.v2Desc: You always know where your project stands. No surprises, no hidden blockers — just clear, direct updates at every stage.
values.v3Desc: I only commit to deadlines I can keep. If scope changes, you hear from me first — not on launch day.
values.v4Desc: I build systems designed to grow with your business, not technical debt you'll pay back in six months.

cta.heading: Let's build something great
cta.subheading: Whether you have a project in mind or just want to explore possibilities — I'm available and ready to help.
